elements.title: lang::report_page_089_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_qa.id                                                           AS id,
       kbi_c.id                                                            AS courseid,
       kbi_c.fullname                                                      AS course,
       kbi_cm.id                                                           AS cmid,
       kbi_qz.id                                                           AS quizid,
       kbi_qz.name                                                         AS quiz_name,
       kbi_u.id                                                            AS userid,
       kbi_u.firstname,
       kbi_u.lastname,
       kbi_u.email,
       kbi_qa.attempt,
       kbi_qa.timestart,
       kbi_qa.timefinish,
       kbi_qa.state                                                        AS attempt_state,
       COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_qatt.id)                                         AS questions,
       SUM(kbi_qatt.maxmark)                                               AS question_maxmark,
       ROUND(SUM(kbi_qatt.maxmark * COALESCE(kbi_qas.fraction, 0)), 2)     AS total_question_score,
       ROUND(kbi_qa.sumgrades, 2)                                          AS rawgrade,
       kbi_qz.sumgrades                                                    AS quiz_raw_max,
       ROUND(CASE WHEN kbi_qz.sumgrades > 0 THEN kbi_qa.sumgrades * 100 / kbi_qz.sumgrades ELSE NULL END, 2) AS score_percent,
       ROUND(CASE WHEN kbi_qz.sumgrades > 0 THEN kbi_qa.sumgrades * kbi_qz.grade / kbi_qz.sumgrades ELSE NULL END, 2) AS finalgrade,
       kbi_qz.grade                                                        AS grademax,
       kbi_gi.gradepass,
       kbi_gg.finalgrade                                                   AS gradebook_finalgrade,
       SUM(CASE WHEN kbi_qas.state = 'gradedright' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)      AS correct_answers,
       SUM(CASE WHEN kbi_qas.state = 'gradedpartial' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)    AS partial_answers,
       SUM(CASE WHEN kbi_qas.state = 'gradedwrong' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)      AS wrong_answers
FROM mdl_quiz_attempts kbi_qa
       JOIN mdl_quiz kbi_qz ON kbi_qz.id = kbi_qa.quiz
       JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_qz.course
       JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_u.id = kbi_qa.userid
       JOIN mdl_question_attempts kbi_qatt ON kbi_qatt.questionusageid = kbi_qa.uniqueid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_question_attempt_steps kbi_qas ON kbi_qas.questionattemptid = kbi_qatt.id
             AND kbi_qas.sequencenumber = (
                 SELECT MAX(kbi_qas2.sequencenumber)
                 FROM mdl_question_attempt_steps kbi_qas2
                 WHERE kbi_qas2.questionattemptid = kbi_qatt.id
             )
       JOIN mdl_modules kbi_m ON kbi_m.name = 'quiz'
       JOIN mdl_course_modules kbi_cm ON kbi_cm.course = kbi_c.id AND kbi_cm.module = kbi_m.id AND kbi_cm.instance = kbi_qz.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_items kbi_gi ON kbi_gi.itemmodule = 'quiz' AND kbi_gi.iteminstance = kbi_qz.id AND kbi_gi.courseid = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_grades kbi_gg ON kbi_gg.itemid = kbi_gi.id AND kbi_gg.userid = kbi_u.id
WHERE kbi_qa.preview = 0
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
  AND kbi_cm.visible = 1
  AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
  AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
  AND kbi_u.username <> 'guest'
GROUP BY kbi_qa.id, kbi_c.id, kbi_cm.id, kbi_qz.id, kbi_u.id, kbi_gi.gradepass, kbi_gg.finalgrade
ORDER BY kbi_c.fullname, kbi_qz.name, kbi_u.lastname, kbi_u.firstname, kbi_qa.attempt
